place. Lord Sri Rama started journey towards forest. If one
questions this, they say, the sages have decided that way. It is
a coincidence.
Once, Lord Indira got all the sages and saints asembled
in Devaloka (heaven) along with Jupiter (Guru) - the
Bruhaspthacharya. As per their desire a beatuiful garden I forest
was to be created on Earth that too in a sacred place called
"Aryavartha" and the same was creatd. After fw years, during
Mahabharatha War, the Lord of Fire asked Lord Krishna for
food. so the beautiful Garden I Forest was given in the form of
charity to the Fire God. The whole forest knwon as "kandava
Forest" was burnt down. with this, Lord Indira got angry and
chided Bmhaspatacharya unappropriately spoke for not selecting
the proper ascendant. Then all the Sages and Saints assembled
and discussed about the proper ascendant is and could not come
to the conclusion. Finally the decision is that "The best
